cit.basis: Progressive corporate income tax (porez na dobit) computed per bracket on taxable profit in EUR.
cit.note: Administered by the Revenue and Customs Administration (Uprava prihoda i carina).

vat.note: Standard PDV rate 21%; reduced rate 7% on certain goods and services.

wht.note: 15% withholding on certain payments to non-residents, subject to tax treaties.

official_sources.name: Revenue and Customs Administration of Montenegro (Uprava prihoda i carina)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated rates and thresholds for the 2025 target period; NOT verified against primary legislation or the tax authority. Must be verified before any real use.
rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Progressive brackets applied per-portion; WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
